caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, greyish-blonde hairstyle and glasses is recording a podcast in a studio. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, gold suspenders, and a red bow tie, while wearing black over-ear headphones. He sits before a black microphone on a desk. In the background, another person with pink hair is visible, and a wall features a framed logo and a banner that reads "UNIQUE FASHION". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Across the sequence, the man speaks into the microphone, shifting his head and facial expression slightly while gesturing with his hand. The background elements and graphics remain static throughout the clip, while the man's subtle movements indicate an active conversation.
